nasb.text: Now there was a long war between the house of Saul and the house of David; and David grew steadily stronger, but the house of Saul grew weaker continually.

esv.text: There was a long war between the house of Saul and the house of David. And David grew stronger and stronger, while the house of Saul became weaker and weaker.

cnv.text: 掃羅家和大衛家之間的戰爭相持很久。大衛家逐漸興盛，掃羅家卻日趨衰微。

ccb.text: 扫罗和大卫两家长期争战，大卫家的势力越来越强，扫罗家却日益衰微。
